_comment: Canonical Slack app manifest for ginnie-agents — workspace-scoped Socket Mode bot. Substitute {{AGENT_NAME}} and {{ROLE_DESCRIPTION}} per agent. Used by the create-agent skill via the apps.manifest.create API. Pulled from a known-working production app and verified against Slack's manifest schema. Do NOT add oauth_config.redirect_urls — that switches the app into the distributed-OAuth flow and breaks the install-on-team install button. The manifest below is the minimal correct shape for a Socket Mode bot the listener can talk to.
